summary: Follow Strategy + In-App Notifications + Pro Gating feature testing complete. All 23 backend tests passed. Frontend tests passed for Leaderboard (Follow buttons, detail modal), Following page (strategy cards, unfollow), and Notification Bell (dropdown, mark all read). Free-tier gating correctly returns 403 on second follow attempt.
passed_tests: Backend GET /api/strategies/following/demo returns 2 mock strategies with metrics
Backend GET /api/notifications/inbox/demo returns 4 mock notifications with 2 unread
Backend POST /api/strategies/{id}/follow without auth returns 401
Backend POST /api/strategies/{id}/unfollow without auth returns 401
Backend GET /api/strategies/following without auth returns 401
Backend GET /api/strategies/following/ids without auth returns 401
Backend GET /api/notifications/inbox without auth returns 401
Backend POST /api/notifications/{id}/read without auth returns 401
Backend POST /api/notifications/read-all without auth returns 401
Backend GET /api/user/pro-status without auth returns 401
Backend GET /api/user/pro-status for free user returns tier=free, follow_limit=1
Backend GET /api/user/pro-status for admin (elite) returns tier=elite, follow_limit=null
Backend POST /api/strategies/{id}/follow creates follow entry and notification
Backend POST /api/strategies/{id}/follow when already following returns success with 'already following'
Backend POST /api/strategies/{id}/unfollow removes follow entry
Backend POST /api/strategies/{id}/unfollow when not following returns success
Backend free-tier first follow succeeds
Backend free-tier second follow returns 403 with upgrade message
Backend GET /api/strategies/following returns list with metrics and is_pro flag
Backend GET /api/notifications/inbox returns notifications with unread_count
Backend POST /api/notifications/read-all marks all as read
Backend GET /api/leaderboard/strategies?demo=true returns 8 strategies
Frontend Leaderboard page: 8 strategy rows with Follow buttons visible
Frontend Leaderboard page: demo-1 and demo-2 show 'Following' (red heart)
Frontend Leaderboard page: Click Follow toggles to 'Following' in demo mode
Frontend Leaderboard page: Strategy detail modal opens with Follow/Unfollow button
Frontend Leaderboard page: Detail modal shows 'Unfollow Strategy' for followed strategies
Frontend Following page: Shows 2 followed strategies with metrics
Frontend Following page: Unfollow button removes strategy card
Frontend Notification bell visible in navigation
Frontend Notification bell shows unread count badge (2)
Frontend Notification dropdown shows 4 demo notifications
Frontend Mark all read button clears unread count
Frontend Navigation has 'Following' link
Frontend Dashboard page loads without regressions
critical_code_review_comments: follow_notifications.py: Well-structured with proper auth checks using get_current_user dependency
follow_notifications.py: Free-tier gating correctly limits to 1 follow with 403 response
follow_notifications.py: Demo endpoints correctly return static mock data without auth
follow_notifications.py: Notification creation on follow works correctly
LeaderboardPage.jsx: Follow buttons properly integrated with toggleFollow function
LeaderboardPage.jsx: UpgradeModal opens on 403 response from follow endpoint
FollowingPage.jsx: Strategy cards display metrics and unfollow functionality works
NotificationBell.jsx: Dropdown shows notifications with mark read functionality
Navigation.jsx: Following link with Heart icon added to nav items

seed_data_creation: Created new free-tier user test_free_user_iter29@my-alpha-ai.com for free-tier gating tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Follow Strategy + Notifications feature fully tested. Demo mode uses static mock data (DEMO_FOLLOWING, DEMO_NOTIFICATIONS). Real mode requires JWT auth. Free tier limited to 1 follow (returns 403 on second attempt). MongoDB collections: followed_strategies (unique index on user_id+strategy_id), notifications_inbox (index on user_id+created_at). Leaderboard pre-seeds followedIds with demo-1 and demo-2 in demo mode. Note: demo_test2@my-alpha-ai.com was upgraded to Pro tier - use test_free_user_iter29@my-alpha-ai.com for free-tier testing.
